title: Steamlite Armor
description: A minimalist steampunk armor resource pack.
body:
Steamlite Armor is a minimalist steampunk resource pack that transforms bulky gear into stylish essentials.

Your helmet becomes classic brass goggles, the chestplate is reimagined as a polished badge, and the leggings are a simple belt, delivering a clean, lightweight aesthetic without losing that signature steampunk charm.
